source: Aggregated from public deal sites (Doctor of Credit, AwardWallet, Frequent Miler, Upgraded Points)

offers.description: Earn $75 back as a statement credit when you spend $300 or more at select Hyatt properties including Hyatt Regency, Hyatt Centric, Grand Hyatt, and Destination by Hyatt.
offers.terms: Select Hyatt properties only. Room rate and room charges. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn a one-time $140 statement credit after spending a minimum of $350 USD on room rate and room charges at participating Marriott properties.
offers.terms: Participating Marriott properties. Room rate and room charges only. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $200 back as a statement credit when you spend $1,000 or more at Hilton Resorts in the U.S. Great for spring and summer resort stays.
offers.terms: U.S. Hilton Resorts only. Room rate and charges. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $50 back as a statement credit when you spend $250 or more across one or more stays at IHG Hotels & Resorts.
offers.terms: IHG Hotels & Resorts properties. One or more stays. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn a one-time $60 statement credit after spending $300 or more at Sonesta Hotels. Targeted offer available on select cards.
offers.terms: Sonesta Hotels. One-time offer. Targeted. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Get $50 back when you spend $250 or more on prepaid lodging bookings at booking.com/amexoffer.
offers.terms: Prepaid lodging bookings only at booking.com/amexoffer. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 20% back as a one-time statement credit on a single car rental booked directly with Turo online or through the Turo mobile app. Car must be returned and paid for by expiry date.
offers.terms: One-time offer. Reservations booked at turo.com or Turo app. Car must be returned and paid for by 3/31/2026.

offers.description: Get $100 statement credit when you spend $500 or more on Cruise America RV rentals. Rental must be completed and paid by expiry date.
offers.terms: RV rentals must be completed and paid by 4/6/2026. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% back as a statement credit on prepaid hotel bookings through Expedia, up to $120 back.
offers.terms: Prepaid hotels using the prepaid option at checkout only at expedia.com/amex. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10 additional Membership Rewards points for each dollar spent on qualifying pre-paid hotel purchases at hotels.com/amexbusiness. Limit of 10,000 bonus points.
offers.terms: Business cards only. Pre-paid hotel purchases at hotels.com/amexbusiness. Limit 10,000 bonus points. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn a one-time $25 statement credit when you spend $200 or more in a single transaction with Viator for tours and activities. Targeted offer.
offers.terms: Single transaction of $200+. Targeted offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn a one-time $75 statement credit when you spend $250 or more online at alterramtn.co. Great for Ikon Pass holders and ski trip purchases.
offers.terms: Online at alterramtn.co only. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 5,000 bonus Membership Rewards points when you spend $250 or more with Airbnb. Add offer to your card and complete a qualifying purchase by the expiry date.
offers.terms: Enrollment required. One-time offer. Points post within 90 days.

offers.description: Earn $50 back as a statement credit when you spend $250 or more at Airbnb. Book directly at airbnb.com or via the Airbnb app.
offers.terms: Online at airbnb.com or Airbnb app only. One-time offer. Gift cards excluded. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $200 back as a statement credit when you spend $750 or more at Lotte New York Palace on room rate and room charges.
offers.terms: Room rate and room charges only. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn $500 back as a statement credit when you spend $2,000 or more on Micato Safaris reservations.
offers.terms: Safari reservations only. Excludes third-party bookings. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn a one-time $60 statement credit after spending a minimum of $300 in-store or online at us.sandro-paris.com.
offers.terms: In-store and online at us.sandro-paris.com. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn a one-time $20 statement credit when you spend $100 or more at Quill.com for office supplies and business essentials. Targeted offer.
offers.terms: Online at quill.com only. One-time offer. Targeted. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn a one-time $50 statement credit after spending a minimum of $200 in one or more purchases in-store at Revo or online at revo.com.
offers.terms: In-store and online at revo.com. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 10% back as a statement credit on CVS Pharmacy purchases, up to $5 back.
offers.terms: In-store and CVS.com. One-time offer. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Business Platinum cardholders can earn up to $1,150 in yearly Dell Technologies credits, including up to $150 in statement credits for Dell purchases plus an additional $1,000 after spending $5,000/year.
offers.terms: Business Platinum Card only. Dell.com purchases. Annual benefit resets each calendar year.

offers.description: Get $50 back when you spend $65 or more on AT&T wireless service. Some users report it also works for AT&T internet services.
offers.terms: AT&T wireless purchases. Enrollment required. Targeted offer.

offers.description: Get $10 back when you spend $29.99 or more on the Disney+, Hulu, and ESPN Unlimited bundle. Can be used up to 6 times for a total of $60 in savings. Available on Platinum and Business Platinum cards.
offers.terms: Platinum and Business Platinum cards. Disney+/Hulu/ESPN bundle subscription. Up to 6 uses. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Amex Platinum cardholders earn up to $75 in statement credits each quarter for purchases at U.S. lululemon retail stores (excluding outlets) and online. Q1 credit expires March 31.
offers.terms: Platinum Card only. U.S. lululemon retail stores and lululemon.com. Excludes outlet stores. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Amex Platinum cardholders earn up to $100 in statement credits each quarter at U.S. restaurants booked through Resy. Q1 credit expires March 31.
offers.terms: Platinum Card only. U.S. Resy-affiliated restaurants. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Get up to $25 in monthly statement credits for eligible streaming purchases including Disney+, Hulu, ESPN, Peacock, Paramount+, NYT, WSJ, YouTube Premium, and YouTube TV.
offers.terms: Platinum Card only. Select streaming and digital subscriptions. Monthly benefit. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Earn 5% back as a statement credit on purchases at Firehouse Subs.
offers.terms: In-store and online purchases. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Spend $60 or more at Walmart.com and earn $20 back as a statement credit. Can be used up to 2 times for a total of $40 back.
offers.terms: Walmart.com and mobile app only. In-store purchases excluded. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Gold Card holders earn up to $10 in monthly statement credits when you pay at Grubhub, The Cheesecake Factory, Goldbelly, Wine.com, and Five Guys.
offers.terms: Gold Card only. Select merchants: Grubhub, Cheesecake Factory, Goldbelly, Wine.com, Five Guys. Monthly benefit. Enrollment required.

offers.description: Transfer Amex Membership Rewards points to British Airways, Iberia, or Aer Lingus Avios at a 30% bonus rate. Get 1,300 Avios for every 1,000 MR points transferred.
offers.terms: Transfer from MR to Avios programs. 30% bonus. Allow 1-2 business days for transfer.
